name: add_user_mcp_source
description: Register the user's own MCP server as a Copass data source. Bearer / header_token / none auth supported. Secrets are stored in a managed secret store — never echoed back. Health check (one-shot tools/list) runs at registration; if it fails, the row lands in `status='error'` and the user can fix and call `test_user_mcp_source`. `app_namespace` is the prefix used to namespace the MCP's tools when an agent opts into `tool_sources=['user_mcp']`; uniqueness checked across active sources in this sandbox. Concierge default `tool_sources` does NOT include 'user_mcp' — opt-in only on the per-agent row.

base_url.description: User's MCP server URL (no trailing slash). https only, except localhost in dev.

token.description: Bearer / header secret. Stored in managed secret store, never persisted on the source row.

app_namespace.description: Tool-name prefix (≤64 chars). Defaults to the data_source_id when absent.

allowed_tools.description: Per-source allowlist on top of the agent-level allowlist.

ingest_tool_calls.description: Tool calls to run on every pull(). Empty = live-tools-only; the source contributes to agent turns but not graph ingestion.

rate_cap_per_minute.description: Per-source tool-call rate cap. Default 60, max 600.

webhook_rate_cap_per_minute.description: Per-source webhook firehose rate cap. Default 600, max 6000.
